name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-cdz

metadata.name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-cdz
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Tencent Cloud Cdz SDK for Python

documentation:
# Tencent Cloud SDK for Python

Tencent Cloud Python Cdz SDK is the official software development kit, which allows Python developers to write software that makes use of Tencent Cloud services like CVM and CBS.
The SDK works on Python versions:

> - 2.7 and greater, including 3.x

## Quick Start

First, install the library:

```sh
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-common
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-cdz
```

or download source code from github and install:

```sh
$ git clone https://github.com/tencentcloud/tencentcloud-sdk-python.git
$ cd tencentcloud-sdk-python
$ python package.py --components common cdz
```

  HostUuids\u548CInstanceIds\u5219\u4F1A\u5931\u6548\u3002"
param _Offset: "\u504F\u79FB\u91CF\uFF0C\u9ED8\u8BA4\u4E3A0\u3002\u5173\u4E8EOffset\u7684\
  \u66F4\u8FDB\u4E00\u6B65\u4ECB\u7ECD\u8BF7\u53C2\u8003 API \u7B80\u4ECB\u4E2D\u7684\

  \u3002"
type CloudDedicatedZoneID: str
type HostUuids: list of str
type InstanceIds: list of str
type Limit: int
type Offset: int
---

methods.name: tencentcloud.cdz.v20221123.models.DescribeCloudDedicatedZoneHostsRequest.CloudDedicatedZoneID
documentation:
专属可用区ID
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.cdz.v20221123.models.DescribeCloudDedicatedZoneHostsRequest.HostUuids
documentation:
一个或多个Host面的CVM实例信息。最大支持查询100台Host。
\:rtype: list of str

methods.name: tencentcloud.cdz.v20221123.models.DescribeCloudDedicatedZoneHostsRequest.InstanceIds
documentation:
查询一个实例或者多个实例所在的Host上面的CVM实例信息。最大支持查询100台实例。
\:rtype: list of str

methods.name: tencentcloud.cdz.v20221123.models.DescribeCloudDedicatedZoneHostsRequest.Offset
documentation:
偏移量，默认为0。关于Offset的更进一步介绍请参考 API 简介中的相关小节。该参数仅与CloudDedicatedZoneID有关，传递了HostUuids和InstanceIds则会失效。
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.cdz.v20221123.models.DescribeCloudDedicatedZoneHostsRequest.Limit
documentation:
返回数量，默认为20，最大值为100。关于Limit的更进一步介绍请参考 API 简介中的相关小节。该参数仅与CloudDedicatedZoneID有关，传递了HostUuids和InstanceIds则会失效。
\:rtype: int
DescribeCloudDedicatedZoneHosts请求参数结构体
